LanguageData.Ammo_12mmautoRailgun_SabotOE.label: 12mm auto Railgun cartridge (Sabot:OE)
LanguageData.Ammo_12mmautoRailgun_SabotOE.description: Fin-stabilized tungsten carbide penetrator with discarding sabot, designed for high calibar handguns.
LanguageData.Bullet_12mmautoRailgun_SabotOE.label: 12mm auto Railgun bullet (Sabot:OE)
